name: WBs-Guide-to-Navidrome
desc: A complete, beginner-friendly guide to building the ultimate self-hosted music server with Navidrome — covering Docker setup, music tagging with Picard, genre …
descFull: A complete, beginner-friendly guide to building the ultimate self-hosted music server with Navidrome — covering Docker setup, music tagging with Picard, genre fixing, smart playlists, radio stations, remote access, and more.
